[textmode.js](../../../index.md) / [Textmodifier](../../Textmodifier.md) / char

# Method: char()

## Call Signature

```ts
char(): string;
```

Current character string used for drawing.

### Returns

`string`

The active character string.

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="char" encoded-code="-IHsKCXQucmVzaXplQ2FudmFzKHdpbmRvdy5pbm5lcldpZHRoLCB3aW5kb3cuaW5uZXJIZWlnaHQpOwp9KTs" />

## Call Signature

```ts
char(value): void;
```

Set the character used by subsequent drawing operations.
Accepts a single character string or a character index in the current font.

### Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `value` | `string` \| `number` | Character string or index in the current font. |

### Returns

`void`

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.js" language="javascript" title="char" encoded-code="-" />
